ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact */,
  "company" TEXT /* Company the contact belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email address */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the email address belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "email_type" TEXT /* Type of email address (e.g., work, personal) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the email address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the email address was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_emails_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_phones" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone number */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact the phone number belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number */,
  "phone_type" TEXT /* Type of phone number (e.g., work, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the phone number was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the phone number was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_phones_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_departments" (
  "contact_department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact-department relationship */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "ownership_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of ownership the department has over the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_departments_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales, marketing, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the contact */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, phone call, meeting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_history" (
  "interaction_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction history */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the contact */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contact */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., email, phone call, meeting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_history_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_history_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interaction_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
